title: [CI:DOCS] authfile.md: add default path of file for Windows/macOS.
body:
@rhatdan @mheon @vrothberg ptal.

I have not checked this is the location actually being used on Windows/macOS. I got the information from the Arch docs here: https://man.archlinux.org/man/containers-auth.json.5.

comments.body:
Adding the "do-not-merge/release-note-label-needed" label because no release-note block was detected, please follow our [release note process](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/release-notes.md) to remove it.

<details>

</details>

I took a look at the code, this is the relevant part:

https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/8b2adb836fd8657b3d8cf2685887e2bc080b79ae/vendor/github.com/containers/image/v5/pkg/docker/config/config.go#L227-L231
